---
title: "surroNMA: Surrogate-Assisted NMA"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{surroNMA: Surrogate-Assisted NMA}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```r
library(surroNMA)

df <- simulate_surro_data(K = 5, J = 10, per_study = 1)
net <- surro_network(df, study=study, trt=trt, comp=comp,
                     S_eff=logHR_S, S_se=se_S, T_eff=logHR_T, T_se=se_T, class=class)

# Frequentist quick mode
fit_f <- surro_nma(net, engine = "freq", B = 50)
summarize_treatments(fit_f)

# Optional Bayesian (requires cmdstanr + CmdStan)
# fit_b <- surro_nma(net, engine = "bayes", bayes_method = "mcmc", iter_sampling = 500)
# summarize_treatments(fit_b)
```
